title: Conflict-free Cooperation Method for Connected and Automated Vehicles at Unsignalized Intersections: Graph-based Modeling and Optimality Analysis
authors: Chaoyi Chen; Qing Xu; Mengchi Cai; Jiawei Wang; Jianqiang Wang; Biao Xu; Keqiang Li
venue: Transportation Research Part C: Emerging Technologies / arXiv version
method_family: Conflict graph + optimal passing order / 冲突图与最优通行顺序

section_headings.heading: 2014 IEEE Intelligent Vehicle Symposium, the Best Paper Award in the 14th

concepts: 把信号控制替换为车辆级调度与控制。
减少急加减速、停车和能耗峰值。
把碰撞风险写成距离、时间间隔或屏障函数。
冲突图与最优通行顺序

section_map.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_map.zh: 定位问题背景、研究缺口和为什么现有保守/非协同方法不足。
section_map.en: Frames the motivation, research gap, and limits of conservative or non-cooperative methods.

section_map.heading: II. PROBLEM STATEMENT
section_map.zh: 把交通交互转写为状态、约束、目标或图结构，是精读时最应复现的部分。
section_map.en: Defines states, constraints, objectives, or graph structures; this is the section to reproduce carefully.

section_map.heading: III. METHODOLOGY
section_map.zh: 给出算法流程和求解机制，应重点追踪输入、输出和安全接口。
section_map.en: Gives the algorithmic mechanism; track inputs, outputs, and safety interfaces.

section_map.heading: IV. SIMULATION
section_map.zh: 检验方法是否真的改善效率、安全或能耗；要关注基准是否公平。
section_map.en: Tests efficiency, safety, or energy claims; inspect whether baselines are fair.

section_map.heading: V. CONCLUSION
section_map.zh: 总结贡献和未来方向，也常暴露作者承认的边界条件。
section_map.en: Summarizes contributions and often reveals author-recognized boundaries.

section_map.heading: 2014 IEEE Intelligent Vehicle Symposium, the Best Paper Award in the 14th
section_map.zh: 作为局部论证段落阅读，关注它如何服务主问题。
section_map.en: Read as a local argument and ask how it supports the main question.

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Graph conflict modeling + passing order”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Graph conflict modeling + passing order. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Mostly longitudinal control, ideal communication, and no lane changing in this paper's base formulation.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 如何把无信号交叉口中复杂的相交、跟驰、合流和分流关系转化为可求解的图排序问题？
overview.core_question_en: How can heterogeneous vehicle conflicts at an unsignalized intersection be encoded as graph relations that yield a conflict-free passing order?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Models trajectory conflicts as a conflict directed graph and coexisting undirected graph; solves passing order through improved depth-first spanning tree and minimum clique cover methods.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Conflict-free graph edges represent crossing, diverging, converging, and reachability conflicts before scheduling.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Optimizes evacuation time and average delay, using distributed control to reduce idling near the stop line.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：较强：图建模把交通冲突类型显式化，便于和 JSSP 的机器冲突/工序约束建立同构关系。

methodology.model_name: 冲突图与排序目标 / Conflict graph and sequencing objective
methodology.formula: G=(V,E_d,E_u),\quad \min_{\pi}\; C_{\max}(\pi)=\max_{i\in V} t_i^{out}\quad \text{s.t.}\; (i,j)\in E_d\Rightarrow i\prec_\pi j
symbols: 每辆车对应一个调度实体
表达必须先后通过的约束
表达是否可同批通过或需分组
调度算法的核心决策变量
methodology.algorithm_zh: 先依据几何轨迹和时间可达性构建冲突有向图与共存无向图；再用改进深度优先生成树和最小团覆盖等图算法求通行组与顺序；最后由分布式控制保证每辆车按序到达冲突区。
methodology.algorithm_en: The method builds directed and undirected graph relations from trajectory conflicts, solves groups and orders with graph algorithms, and executes the resulting order via distributed vehicle control.
methodology.stability_zh: 图约束先把不安全组合排除，控制层只需执行已筛选的顺序。实时性取决于图规模和团覆盖求解，但比直接连续优化全车轨迹更结构化。
methodology.stability_en: Safety is front-loaded into graph constraints; tractability improves because the continuous-control layer receives a filtered sequence rather than solving all interactions jointly.
assumptions: 车辆轨迹模板和冲突点可提前计算。
车辆遵守分配的通行顺序，通信近似理想。
主要聚焦纵向控制，横向变道不是核心问题。

experiments.validation: Traffic simulations over varying vehicle counts and volumes; reports efficiency and fuel-economy improvements.
experiments.baselines: 常见基准包括 FCFS、交通灯控制、无协同控制和其他图排序策略。
experiments.metrics: 平均延误 (average delay)、总清空时间 (evacuation time)、吞吐量 (throughput)、燃油/能耗代理和停车次数。
experiments.ablation: 图关系本身有可解释性，但仍需更系统地拆分：仅有向图、仅无向图、不同团覆盖策略和不同交通流密度下的鲁棒性。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。

figure_table_cues.zh: 冲突关系图 / 通行顺序图
figure_table_cues.reading: 把节点、边类型和先后约束翻译成 JSSP 的作业、机器和析取约束。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 图构造依赖精确几何和预测，异常驾驶会导致边集失真。
团覆盖/排序在大规模密集车流下可能成为瓶颈。
模型偏重全 CAV 场景，对低渗透率混合交通支持不足。
extensions: 把图边类型作为异构图 (heterogeneous graph) 特征，训练 GNN 调度器。
将最小团覆盖与 JSSP disjunctive graph 融合，建立可证明安全的调度层。
引入不确定边权，做分布鲁棒通行排序 (distributionally robust sequencing)。
critique.project_use: Strong support for representing intersection conflicts as typed graph relations, similar to the operation graph in this manuscript.

interactive.response_zh: 边密度升高会减少可并行通行组，通常增大清空时间。
interactive.response_en: Higher edge density reduces parallel passing groups and increases evacuation time.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
